description.en: Retrieve details of a specific Cal.com booking by its unique identifier.
description.de: Details einer bestimmten Cal.com-Buchung anhand ihrer eindeutigen Kennung abrufen.

vars.API_KEY: env:CAL_COM_API_KEY|Get your API key from Cal.com Settings > Developer > API Keys at https://app.cal.com/settings/developer/api-keys

inputs.name: Booking UID

description.en: The unique identifier of the booking to retrieve.
description.de: Die eindeutige Kennung der abzurufenden Buchung.

inputs.bot: The unique identifier (UID) of the booking to retrieve details for.
